scripts.cli:ir:export: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId demo-ir --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:export:baseline: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId baseline-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:export:current1: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId current-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:export:current2: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId current-2 --entry src/entry.basic.v2.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:diff:pass: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId baseline-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir export --runId current-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir diff --runId diff-1 --before .logix/out/ir.export/baseline-1 --after .logix/out/ir.export/current-1 --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:diff:violation: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId baseline-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir export --runId current-2 --entry src/entry.basic.v2.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && node ./scripts/expect-reason.mjs --reason CLI_PROTOCOL_VIOLATION --exit 2 -- logix ir diff --runId diff-2 --before .logix/out/ir.export/baseline-1 --after .logix/out/ir.export/current-2 --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:demo:pass: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId baseline-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir export --runId current-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir diff --runId diff-1 --before .logix/out/ir.export/baseline-1 --after .logix/out/ir.export/current-1 --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:demo:violation: pnpm -s cli:build && logix ir export --runId baseline-1 --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && logix ir export --runId current-2 --entry src/entry.basic.v2.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && node ./scripts/expect-reason.mjs --reason CLI_PROTOCOL_VIOLATION --exit 2 -- logix ir diff --runId diff-2 --before .logix/out/ir.export/baseline-1 --after .logix/out/ir.export/current-2 --outRoot .logix/out
scripts.cli:ir:consistency:smoke: pnpm -s cli:build && node ../../packages/logix-cli/dist/bin/logix.js ir export --runId smoke-ir --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out && node ../../packages/logix-cli/dist/bin/logix.js trialrun --runId smoke-trialrun --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot --outRoot .logix/out --diagnosticsLevel off && node ./scripts/check-ir-consistency.mjs
scripts.cli:trialrun: pnpm -s cli:build && logix trialrun --runId demo-trialrun --entry src/entry.basic.ts#AppRoot
scripts.cli:trialrun:host:node: pnpm -s cli:build && logix trialrun --runId demo-host-node --entry src/entry.browser-global.ts#AppRoot
scripts.cli:trialrun:host:browser-mock: pnpm -s cli:build && logix trialrun --runId demo-host-browser-mock --host browser-mock --entry src/entry.browser-global.ts#AppRoot
scripts.cli:trialrun:trace: pnpm -s cli:build && logix trialrun --runId demo-trialrun-trace --cliConfig ./logix.cli.json --profile trace
scripts.cli:transform:report: pnpm -s cli:build && logix transform module --runId demo-transform-1 --ops tutorials/06-transform-module-report/delta.add-state-action.json --mode report --outRoot .logix/out
